description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust, synthetic full stock. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The receiver is compact and streamlined, with a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. A single red shotgun shell is depicted adjacent to the loading port, emphasizing its ammunition type. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, full synthetic stock, and a visible red shotgun shell near the loading port.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and fore-end, with the red shotgun shell visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the barrel, ribbed pump, trigger guard, and full stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the textured butt of the stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the loading port area, ribbed pump, and the red shotgun shell positioned below the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
